holdings.infoBox: BNGE is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Take-Two Interactive Software stock at 5.16%, Aristocrat Leisure at 5.00%, NetEase at 4.82%, Roku, Inc. at 4.77%, and Kuaishou Technology at 4.59%.

overview.description: The First Trust S-Network Streaming and Gaming ETF (BNGE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S-Network Streaming & Gaming index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies around the globe that are actively involved in content streaming, eSports, and iGaming. BNGE was launched on Jan 25, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.
